pages.text: $(o)"Home is not behind you, home is in your heart. The circle just brings the heart back."$()$(br2)— Common-Magus Guild emblem motto. The plainest spell carries the deepest longing.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Teleport the $(l)caster$() to their respawn point (bed or world spawn).$(br2)If no valid bed, falls back to world spawn.$(br2)Cost: $(l)1600$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Insurance for deep mining, far expeditions, dimension travel.$(br2)Caster only — teammates make their own way.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 1 Dormant$() works — the earliest reliable lifeline.
